name: Acolyte
feature_desc: You can perform religious ceremonies and receive free healing and care at temples.

name: Criminal
feature_desc: You have a reliable and trustworthy contact in the criminal underworld.

name: Folk Hero
feature_desc: You can secure free room and board for yourself and your companions in rural areas.

name: Noble
feature_desc: You can secure an audience with local nobility and receive free lodging and food.

name: Sage
feature_desc: You can find information about obscure topics in libraries and archives.

name: Soldier
feature_desc: You can secure free lodging and food for yourself and your companions in military installations.
